## What this PR does

One or two sentences on the user-facing effect of the change.

## Linked spec or issue

Link to the issue or design note this PR implements. If there isn't one, explain why (e.g. trivial doc fix).

## Test coverage

- [ ] New or updated tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] `python3 -m pytest tests/lib/ -q` passes locally.
- [ ] `bash tests/hooks/test_*.sh` passes locally.
- [ ] `shellcheck` clean (if the diff touches shell scripts).

## Changelog

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an `## [Unreleased]` entry describing this change.

## Other

Anything reviewers should know — unusual decisions, follow-up work you're deferring, screenshots if UI-visible.
